Package in.co.rays.proj4.util

Class DataUtility

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataUtility
public class DataUtility extends Object
Utility class to perform data type conversions, formatting, and formatting-safe data extractions across the application layer.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Vinay

    Formatter instance for standard date conversions.
    private static final SimpleDateFormat
    timeFormatter
    Formatter instance for timestamp/time conversions.

    Description

    getCurrentTimestamp()
    Generates a Timestamp reflecting the current system execution clock time.

    Parses a string value into a Date object based on APP_DATE_FORMAT.

  • Constructor Details

    • DataUtility

      public DataUtility()

  • Method Details

    • getString

      public static String getString(String val)
      Trims and returns the string if it contains data, otherwise returns the original value.
      Parameters:
      val - The raw input string
      Returns:
      String trimmed value, or the original null/empty value

    • getStringData

      public static String getStringData(Object val)
      Converts an object to its String representation safely. Returns an empty string if null.
      Parameters:
      val - The object to convert
      Returns:
      String representation of the object, or empty string "" if null

    • getInt

      public static int getInt(String val)
      Parses a string value into an integer safely. Returns 0 if validation fails.
      Parameters:
      val - The string containing the integer data
      Returns:
      int parsed primitive integer value, or 0 if invalid

    • getLong

      public static long getLong(String val)
      Parses a string value into a long safely. Returns 0 if validation fails.
      Parameters:
      val - The string containing the long data
      Returns:
      long parsed primitive long value, or 0 if invalid

    • getDate

      public static Date getDate(String val)
      Parses a string value into a Date object based on APP_DATE_FORMAT. Returns null if parsing encounters an exception.
      Parameters:
      val - The formatted date string
      Returns:
      Date parsed date object, or null if parsing fails

    • getDateString

      public static String getDateString(Date date)
      Formats a Date object into a string representation based on APP_DATE_FORMAT. Returns an empty string if formatting fails or date is null.
      Parameters:
      date - The date object to convert
      Returns:
      String formatted date string, or empty string ""

    • getTimestamp

      public static Timestamp getTimestamp(String val)
      Parses a string value into a Timestamp object based on APP_TIME_FORMAT. Returns null if parsing fails.
      Parameters:
      val - The formatted time/date string
      Returns:
      Timestamp parsed timestamp object, or null if invalid

    • getTimestamp

      public static Timestamp getTimestamp(long l)
      Creates a Timestamp object from raw millisecond values. Returns null if processing throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      l - epoch time value in milliseconds
      Returns:
      Timestamp instantiated timestamp object, or null

    • getCurrentTimestamp

      public static Timestamp getCurrentTimestamp()
      Generates a Timestamp reflecting the current system execution clock time.
      Returns:
      Timestamp current system timestamp object

    • getTimestamp

      public static long getTimestamp(Timestamp tm)
      Extracts the long millisecond value from a given Timestamp instance. Returns 0 if an exception occurs.
      Parameters:
      tm - The target Timestamp object
      Returns:
      long time value in milliseconds, or 0 if target is null
